title: Clippit convert result
description: Result payload of a Clippit convert command (`clippit word to-html`, `clippit word from-html`, or `clippit excel to-html`) written to stdout in JSON mode.

input.description: Absolute path of the source file, or '<stdin>' when read from stdin.

output.description: Absolute path of the generated output file, or '<stdout>' when written to stdout.

outputSize.description: Size of the generated output file in bytes.
